name: Robert Redford's Whole Wheat Quick Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tbsp Lightly salted butter or margarine; melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Grease a 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
3. Mix together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
4. In another large bowl, beat the egg.
5. Stir in the buttermilk, molasses (or honey), and melted butter.
6. Add the flour mixture to the egg mixture, stirring until combined.
7. Fold in the chopped walnuts and raisins.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
9. Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until the bread is well browned.
10. Remove from the oven and place on a wire rack to cool.
11. Makes 1 loaf.
